# Agentic CI/CD Copilot — Recommended Fix

Remove or correct the invalid 'Ignore' value from the flake8 'ignore' option in the configuration.

## Commands to Apply

```bash
sed -i '/^ignore *= *Ignore/d' setup.cfg || true
sed -i '/^ignore *= *Ignore/d' tox.ini || true
```

*Generated by [Agentic CI/CD Copilot](https://github.com/Atharv5873/Agentic-CI-CD-Copilot)*
